heading: Fraudulent interstate transactions
label: 77q Fraudulent interstate transactions
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “section 3(a)(78) of the Securities Exchange Act”, and was translated as meaning section 3(a)(78) of , to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Section 78c(a)(78) of this titleact June 6, 1934, ch. 404

children.heading: Use of interstate commerce for purpose of fraud or deceit
children.label: a Use of interstate commerce for purpose of fraud or deceit

children.text: to employ any device, scheme, or artifice to defraud, or

to obtain money or property by means of any untrue statement of a material fact or any omission to state a material fact necessary in order to make the statements made, in light of the circumstances under which they were made, not misleading; or
to engage in any transaction, practice, or course of business which operates or would operate as a fraud or deceit upon the purchaser.

children.heading: Use of interstate commerce for purpose of offering for sale
children.label: b Use of interstate commerce for purpose of offering for sale
children.text: It shall be unlawful for any person, by the use of any means or instruments of transportation or communication in interstate commerce or by the use of the mails, to publish, give publicity to, or circulate any notice, circular, advertisement, newspaper, article, letter, investment service, or communication which, though not purporting to offer a security for sale, describes such security for a consideration received or to be received, directly or indirectly, from an issuer, underwriter, or dealer, without fully disclosing the receipt, whether past or prospective, of such consideration and the amount thereof.

children.heading: Exemptions of section 77c not applicable to this section
children.label: c Exemptions of section 77c not applicable to this section
children.text: The exemptions provided in shall not apply to the provisions of this section.section 77c of this title

children.heading: Authority with respect to security-based swap agreements
children.label: d Authority with respect to security-based swap agreements
children.text: The authority of the Commission under this section with respect to security-based swap agreements (as defined in ) shall be subject to the restrictions and limitations of .section 78c(a)(78) of this titlesection 77b–1(b) of this title
